docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-04-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-04-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY; PLAINTIFF APRIL BLANDING IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NICHOLAS GONZALEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LISETTE GONZALES IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY THE PLAINTIFF. PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO NICHOLAS GONZALEZ ON FILE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLANDING, APRIL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALES, NICOLAS $8,406.91 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,531.91 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-04-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-06-2026 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-02-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, NICOLAS
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: PER CURRENT RESIDENT, RESPONDENT DOES NOT LIVE AT ADDRESS PROVIDED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLANDING, APRIL AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, LISETTE
